rulings.Case Title: RENE ANDALES et al VS. MISSION HOTEL, LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Terminating Sanctions Against Pltf'S For Failing To Comply With Order To Attend Their Depositions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 7, 2014, Line 1: DEFENDANT MISSION HOTEL and TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC's Motion For Terminating Sanctions Against Plaintiffs For Failing To Comply With Order To Attend their Depositions: GRANTED. Complaint of Micah Kemp and Charles Mulieri is dismissed with prejudice. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FARZENAH AMINI VS. RAYMOND JETER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 7, 2014, Line 3: PLAINTIFF FARZENAH AMINI'S MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO COMPLAINT: DENIED without prejudice. It is impossible to determine based on the documents of which judicial notice is requested whether Whitfield Funding LLC was/is suspended at relevant times. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ZHOU HUA RONG et al VS. LARRY WEI et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 7, 2014, Line 4: DEFENDANTS LARRY WEI and FONG CHIENG's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: Continued to October 31, 2014 at 9:30 AM in Department 501. Parties shall provide courtesy copies of the moving papers, opposition and reply. The Court is in receipt of the courtesy copy of the operative complaint. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHLOE GATES et al VS. THOMAS A. BROCATO, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS TRUSTEE OF et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 7, 2014, Line 5: DEFENDANT THOMAS A. BROCATO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: Sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer to the 7th cause of action (constructive eviction) is sustained with leave to amend to allege whether constructive eviction was caused by failure to make repairs after the fire of failure to maintain the property prior to the fire. Demurer to the 9th cause of action (violation of Business and Professions Code 17200) is overruled, restitution of overpaid rent may be sought as "profits unfairly obtained to the extent that these profits represent monies given to the defendant or benefits in which the plaintiff has an ownership interest." Korea Supply v. Lockhead Martin Corp. (2003) 29 Cal.4th 1134. Demurer to the 10th cause of action (violation of CCC 1950.5) is sustained with leave to amend to allege that tenancy was terminated. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SBERLO FAMILY TRUST VS. TANYA PHILLIPS (3/19/12-AMENDED TO CONTRACT ACTION)
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Allow Doe Amendments
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 7, 2014, Line 6: CROSS COMPLAINANT TANYA PHILLIPS' Motion To Allow Doe Amendments: Continued to October 23, 2014 to be heard in Department 302 per the order of the presiding judge. CCP 170.6 filed and accepted on April 11, 2013; it cannot be legally withdrawn. Stebbins v. White (1987) 190 Cal.App.3d 769, 781 (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: AGRIPINO AYUDA ARCELO VS. DUVONCE L BEAN et al
